topic: Your Harness Your Memory - Open Harness vs Managed Agents 舆论战

signals.title: Why memory isn't a plugin (it's the harness)
signals.author: Sarah Wooders (Letta CTO, MemGPT co-author)
signals.use: Harrison 引用的原框架：'plug memory into harness 如同 plug driving into car'

signals.title: Deep Agents Deploy: an open alternative to Claude Managed Agents
signals.author: LangChain
signals.use: 关键发现：Harrison 的长推本质是 Deep Agents Deploy 的营销配套。'Your Harness Your Memory' 不是观点文，是产品战宣言。直接标题就是'open alternative to Claude Managed Agents'

signals.title: Context Constitution
signals.author: Letta
signals.use: Sarah 的产品配套。Letta 同期推出 Context Constitution+Letta Code (memory-first harness)，把'开源 harness+自有 memory'推为行业原则

signals.title: Anthropic's Claude Managed Agents gives enterprises a new one-stop shop but raises vendor 'lock-in' risk
signals.author: VentureBeat
signals.key_quote: Session data is stored in a database managed by Anthropic, increasing the risk that enterprises become locked into a system run by a single company.
signals.use: 主流科技媒体交叉验证 Harrison 的锁定论点 - 这不是 LangChain 一家之言

signals.title: Anthropic Targets AI Data Center Bottleneck With Managed Agents
signals.author: DataCenterKnowledge
signals.use: 记录 Managed Agents 客户名单：Notion, Asana, Rakuten, Sentry, Atlassian。说明 Harrison 不是在空打，是在跟真金白银客户抢市场

signals.title: Anthropic will let your agents sleep on its couch
signals.author: The Register (Thomas Claburn)
signals.use: 英国媒体视角，语气偏戏谑，标题'sleep on its couch'暗含锁定意味

signals.title: Claude Code's source code appears to have leaked
signals.author: VentureBeat
key_facts: Claude Code v2.1.88 npm 包 .map 文件泄漏
核心 memory 架构: MEMORY.md 索引 + 主题文件 + 转录 grep
signals.use: 证据源 1: harness 规模 (51.2 万行) = Harrison 反驳'模型吸收 harness'的硬证据

signals.title: 脑手分离：Anthropic 不再只卖模型了（Managed Agents 架构拆解）
signals.use: vault 内已有知识：已命名'Harness 保质期'、'脑手分离'、'调度税'概念。本次是 Harrison 对该文章主角的反击，必须强双链

signals.title: Claude Code 源码泄漏全景
signals.use: vault 内 10+ 篇 Claude Code 源码拆解，为 Harrison 的'harness 是重器'论点提供在地化验证

signals.title: The Anatomy of an Agent Harness
signals.author: LangChain
signals.use: Harrison 自家此前发的长篇技术博客，'harness'一词的官方 LangChain 语义源头。追溯其理论系谱

cross_validation_strength: 高。4 个主流科技媒体（VentureBeat、DataCenterKnowledge、The Register、WaveSpeed）独立报道 Managed Agents 锁定风险。LangChain 博客+Letta 博客+两位 CEO 推文形成 4 点开源派信号同向爆发。
blind_spot_signals: VentureBeat 同时指出自建 orchestration 的成本：'企业被 orchestration 负担压迫，Managed Agents 提供了真实的减负价值'——Harrison 没承认的点
Medium AI Studio 强调 Managed Agents 的'10x faster development'——开源 harness 的时间成本是硬伤
